title: 日本ダービーの後に・広まりゆく露水

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey enters the Japanese Derby and
shows off her feng shui footwork.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She once believed that the Japanese Derby was
ill fit for her in terms of feng shui, but that
changed when she met me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, Copano Rickey is catapulted toward her
goal of bringing everyone happiness through feng
shui as her victory kicks off a new feng shui boom.
